MQTT.description: [Traduction en cours] Python MQTT messaging module

topic.description: [Traduction en cours] Declare an MQTT topic variable

initialise.description: [Traduction en cours] Initialise a topic variable with a name and QoS level

mqtt.syntax: mqtt jeton {token} id {clientID} broker {broker} port {port} abonne {topic} [et {topic}...] [action {name} requires {field} [et {field}...]]
mqtt.description: [Traduction en cours] Create and connect an MQTT client with subscriptions and optional action validation
mqtt.examples: mqtt jeton Token id `client1` broker `test.mosquitto.org` port 1883 abonne MyTopic

sur.description: [Traduction en cours] Register a handler for MQTT connect or message events

envoie.description: [Traduction en cours] Send a structured message to an MQTT topic with sender, action, and payload
envoie.examples: envoie à/a OutTopic sender MyTopic action `update` message Data

message.description: [Traduction en cours] The most recently received MQTT message

topic.description: [Traduction en cours] The name and QoS of a topic variable as JSON
